name: sgs-blocks
description: Custom Gutenberg block library for Small Giants Studio

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/generate-icons.js && node scripts/generate-extension-attributes.js && node scripts/check-dead-controls.js --check && node scripts/check-hardcoded-render-defaults.js --check && node scripts/check-control-ux.js --check
scripts.prestart: node scripts/generate-icons.js && node scripts/generate-extension-attributes.js && node scripts/check-dead-controls.js --check && node scripts/check-hardcoded-render-defaults.js --check && node scripts/check-control-ux.js --check
